title: Web UX Test Step
description: A single deterministic step in a web UX test plan. Steps map 1:1 to Playwright test.step() blocks at generation time.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, unique within the plan.

title.description: Human-readable description used as the test.step() label.

action.description: The deterministic action this step performs.

target.description: How to locate the element this action operates on. Required for all DOM-interacting actions.

value.description: Action payload: text to fill, option to select, key(s) to press, expected text/value/count, or file path(s) to upload.

url.description: Absolute URL or path used by navigate / assert_url.

state.description: Element/page state to wait for when action is wait_for.

optional.description: When true, a failure of this step is reported but does not fail the test (e.g. dismiss-if-present).

needs_discovery.description: Marks a step whose selector is unknown and must be resolved via Playwright MCP discovery before CLI execution.

selector.description: Accessible-first locator. Exactly one primary strategy should be set; css/xpath are discouraged fallbacks.

role.description: ARIA role for getByRole (e.g. button, tab, dialog, textbox).

name.description: Accessible name used with role, or label/text/testid value depending on strategy.

css.description: Discouraged CSS fallback; only when no accessible locator exists.

nth.description: Zero-based index when the locator resolves to multiple elements.

within.description: Scopes this locator inside a parent locator (e.g. a dialog).
